creator: perky@fallin.lv
text:
python port for development version.
Python's alpha version has many fresh new features.
This port will be useful for early adoptors who want to feel new python.
(Python 2.2 will be released on 19 December.)

It's need to fix ports/Mk/bsd.python.mk and lang/python port, also.
and, tg can take maintainership of this if he want. :)

Fix: this is lang/python port and bsd.port.mk

*** this is shar of new port.
